name: Omnath, Locus of Creation
oracle_text:
When Omnath, Locus of Creation enters the battlefield, draw a card.
Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 4 life if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn. If it's the second time, add {R}{G}{W}{U}. If it's the third time, Omnath deals 4 damage to each opponent and each planeswalker you don't control.
design_notes: A 4-color mythic legendary creature demonstrating maximum color complexity. Shows: (1) four colors in mana cost with no generic mana — extreme color commitment, (2) ETB draw smooths the investment, (3) Landfall is a named ability word (italicized reminder), (4) escalating triggered ability that tracks resolution count within a turn — very complex but mythic-appropriate. Each Landfall tier maps to a color's identity: lifegain (W), mana (all four), damage (R). Peak mythic complexity.
